name: Sabrett Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onion thinly into rings about 1/4 inch thick or less.
2. Separate rings.
3. Heat oil in a pan.
4. Gently toss onions until all are coated with oil.
5. Stir in spices.
6. Cover and braise slowly over very low heat, stirring occasionally.
7. Braise for about 10 minutes, being sure onions don't brown.
8. Add water if needed.
9. Braise an additional 10 minutes.
Onions can be made hours in advance, but if they are to be held more than an hour, additional water may have to be added.
